baseline_41x.note: Baseline (run_blueedge_productized_01) was NOT produced by the PIOS 41.x pipeline. It was produced by 4 FastAPI conformance contracts (manual forensic analysis).
baseline_41x.signal_source: Manual z-score recomputation from 40.3/structural_topology_log.json import counts

orchestrated_41x.note: Orchestrated run used PIOS compute scripts (run_end_to_end.py → compute_signal_projection.py → compute_zone_projection.py).

pressure_zone_count_differs.note: Baseline has 1 pressure zone (PZ-001 anchor DOM-04). Orchestrated has 4 pressure zones (PZ-001 DOM-04, PZ-002 DOM-05, PZ-003 DOM-08, PZ-004 DOM-09). Cause: PIOS pipeline computes pressure zones from binding_envelope topology (synthetic fan_in graph) which creates 4 domain-level pressure candidates. Baseline was manually computed against actual 40.3 topology with single compound zone.

finding: 41.x delta is fundamental. Baseline 41.x signal values came from manual recomputation over 40.3 import topology. Orchestrated 41.x signal values came from PIOS compute_signal_projection.py over binding_envelope synthetic topology. Same CEU population, different computation graph → different signal values and different pressure zone count.
